mapper.sql: SELECT d.id, d.task_id, d.pre_task_id, d.depend_type, d.delay_days, d.create_by, d.create_time, d.del_flag FROM project_manage_wbs_dependency d
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_manage_wbs_dependency WHERE task_id = #{preTaskId} AND pre_task_id = #{taskId} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO project_manage_wbs_dependency (task_id, pre_task_id, depend_type, delay_days, create_by, create_time, del_flag) VALUES
(#{item.taskId}, #{item.preTaskId}, #{item.dependType}, #{item.delayDays}, #{item.createBy}, NOW(), '0')
mapper.update: UPDATE project_manage_wbs_dependency SET del_flag = '1', update_time = NOW() WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND del_flag = '0'

UPDATE project_manage_wbs_dependency d SET d.del_flag = '1', d.update_time = NOW() WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM project_manage_wbs w WHERE w.id = d.task_id AND w.project_id = #{projectId} AND w.del_flag = '0' ) AND d.del_flag = '0'
